Project QUOKKA — Proposed acquisition of Lumaco Systems Ltd (ACN 0X1 234 5X6) by Northstrand Capital Pty Ltd; non‑binding term sheet, subject to final documentation and board approvals.
Structure: scheme of arrangement under Part 5.1 of the Corporations Act; Lumaco board to unanimously recommend (subject to superior proposal); ASIC and Court approval required; ASX timetable to be followed.
Consideration: A$128,000,000 cash + A$12,000,000 vendor scrip in Northstrand Holdings (unlisted) + optional A$5,000,000 equivalent in “AuroraAUD” stablecoin on QuendaChain; 10% escrow at Kookaburra Mutual Bank (acct ****3X9) for 12 months.
Exclusivity: 6‑week no‑shop and no‑talk (customary fiduciary carve‑out); break fee A$1,900,000; standstill 12 months; key employee retention pool A$3,200,000 funded at completion.
Information barriers: clean team to handle customer PII, wallet logs, and incident artifacts; wall‑crossing consents to be obtained before VDR access; insider list maintained per s1043A; only cleared staff in “Room A”.
Blackout: all persons on the insider list subject to a trading blackout from signing until cleansing notice; no tipping or selective disclosure; no analyst guidance updates prior to ASX announcement.
MNPI—cyber: unannounced ransomware event on 5‑May‑2026 with approx 19GB exfil from “api‑gate‑east”; OAIC notification drafted but not lodged; no customer notifications issued pending forensics.
MNPI—crypto ops: validator set instability on QuendaChain 17‑Apr‑2026; hot‑wallet remediation and key‑rotation underway; de‑peg risk model flagged “amber”; none of this information is generally available.
MNPI—ESG: preliminary Scope 2 restatement for FY25 (‑14% vs prior disclosure) and potential write‑down of “GreenPoint Offsets” inventory; not yet reflected in the sustainability report or website.
Data room refs: https://vdr.quenda.au/p/Proj‑Quokka/term‑sheet?v=gf1%2F4x and F O L D E R “Ops/IR‑0519_r3” (see file “exfil_report_1 9 . p d f”); internal deal ref AU.NSC.LUM.2026‑Δ.
Contacts: Ms. Priya Halbrook, CFO, priya.halbrook@lumaco.systems; Mr. Darian K. Welles, Partner, dwelles@northstrand.capital, +61 2 3456 7890; office: Level 14, 88 Quokka St, Kurrabee QLD 0000.
Conditions: FIRB no‑objection, no prescribed occurrences, no material customer loss, and consents from top 10 suppliers; no MAC clause applies (absence of a MAC is intentional and does not constitute a waiver of fraud).
Regulatory: Lumaco to seek ASX in‑principle advice re Listing Rule 11; cleansing notice timing to be coordinated; any trading halt examples in staff slides are illustrative only and not deal‑stage signals.
Benign/educational: our public ESG explainer and a marketing post titled “Top 10 ransomware myths” reuse words like “token”, “insider list”, and “breach” for training purposes only and contain no non‑public data.
operations note (non‑mnpi): update asx timetable draft, scrub pii from incident logs before clean‑team upload, confirm crypto wallet nomenclature in run‑book, finalise esg dashboard mock‑ups.
Confidentiality: subject to NDA; no public announcement without mutual consent; non‑binding save for exclusivity, costs, governing law (NSW), and dispute resolution (ACICA rules).
